panels.description: Medium shot: Protagonist crouched in the dark, touching the curate's leg, hand gripping the curate's arm, dust and plaster debris falling in the foreground, tense atmosphere, claustrophobic lighting.

bubbles.text: I touched the curate's leg, and he started so violently that a mass of plaster went sliding down.

panels.description: Close up: Protagonist peering through a narrow vertical slit in the debris, wide eye catching a sliver of light from outside, expression of shock and caution.

bubbles.text: The detachment of the plaster had left a vertical slit open in the debris.

panels.description: Wide shot: View through the slit showing a suburban landscape completely leveled, a massive crater where a house once stood, twisted metal and debris, apocalyptic tone.

bubbles.text: Vast, indeed, was the change that we beheld. The fifth cylinder had pulverized the neighborhood.

panels.description: Wide shot: Looking down into the colossal cylindrical pit, deep earth shadows, metallic structures glinting in the dark, bright green light casting eerie veils across the abyss.

bubbles.text: The cylinder lay far beneath, a heavy beating sound emanated from the dark depths.
